Interview Prep — March 25, 2026

Texas Tribune Crash Course

Your goal isn't to become a D3/Django expert overnight. It's to walk into that interview able to talk about these tools with confidence — understand what they do, why the Tribune uses them, and how they fit together. Mental models, not memorized code.

← Back to courses

The Goal

You might not get a single technical question. But if D3 or Django comes up in conversation, you want to sound like someone who's worked with these tools, not someone who just read the Wikipedia page. That means understanding the why and the how it feels — not just the what.

The Two Concepts

Concept 1

D3.js — What It Is and How to Talk About It

What D3 actually does, why it's different from Chart.js or Tableau, how the Tribune uses it for maps and election graphics, and the key vocabulary that shows you get it.
Concept 2

Django — What It Is and How to Talk About It

How Django works as a framework, why newsrooms love it, the admin panel, how it serves data to D3 charts, and the key ideas that show you understand the stack.

YouTube — Watch These Tonight

These aren't coding tutorials. Pick the short ones. You're building a mental picture, not learning to code from scratch.

D3.js
D3.js in 100 Seconds
Fireship — Best 2-minute overview of what D3 is and why it exists. Watch this first.
2 min
D3.js Full Course — freeCodeCamp
Curran Kelleher — Don't watch all 13 hrs. Skip to a bar chart section (~30 min) just to see what building a D3 chart looks like.
skip around
Django
Django in 20 Minutes
Tech With Tim — See the full Django flow start to finish in one sitting. Best bang for your time.
20 min
Django Crash Course
Traversy Media — Builds a polls app. Good for seeing models, views, templates, and admin in action.
1 hr
Corey Schafer — Django Series
The classic. Watch episode 1 & 2 just to see how a project is set up. 17 episodes total but you only need the first couple.
ep 1-2

Recommended order: Fireship D3 (2 min) → Tech With Tim Django (20 min) → read both crash course pages → Traversy Django crash course if you have time.
